---
title: "Story Telling"
subtitle: "Data Science Portfolio"
---

# Data Storytelling
## Communicating Insights

Data is only as valuable as the story it tells. In these projects, I focus on crafting compelling narratives, visualizations, and dashboards using tools like PowerBI and DAX to communicate business insights effectively.

[Explore my Github for Flight Delays](https://github.com/DMartinez06B/Flight_Delays_DS)
